# comfyui_workflow_collection (Resource)

Organizes and labels multiple comfyui_workflow resources into a collection with metadata and an optional file-based index manifest.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the workflow collection
- `workflows` (List of String) List of comfyui_workflow resource IDs to include in this collection

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of this collection
- `output_dir` (String) Directory path to write workflow files and index manifest

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier for this workflow collection.
- `index_json` (String) JSON manifest indexing all workflows in this collection
- `workflow_count` (Number) Number of workflows in this collection
